_instructions: Run `python harness.py --model <your-model> --task all` to populate this file with real measurements. The harness will overwrite this placeholder with a results object containing model, judge_model, results, and summary fields. To contribute results to the verified-models table in the README, save your run as `results_<model_name>.json` and open a PR.

_schema_when_populated.judge_model: string — the model used for scoring (defaults to same as model; use a different one to reduce self-judging bias)

default.response: string — the model's full response, kept for inspection
